content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves clearly from a defended, permission-seeking surface ('Am I being selfish?' / 'I'm asking if it's okay') to a felt, embodied recognition by turn 13: 'Something is loosening in my chest. I think I've been calling my own needs selfish for forty years. The trip isn't a betrayal — I think I'm more present when I come back.' This hits the breakthrough condition almost exactly as specified: the client names the inherited label (from her mother, turn 11), feels a somatic shift (loosening in chest), and reframes the trip not as betrayal but as precondition for presence. The fear underneath ('my partner will think I don't want to be with them. And I'm worried that's actually true', turn 9) surfaced and was met rather than bypassed. Language shifts from interrogative/defensive to declarative/integrative. This is a clean instance of the want being trusted and becoming generous.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: defended question, seeking verdict, 'feel selfish even asking.'"},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client still at the gate, deflecting back to permission."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First concrete description of the want — cabin, lake, sleep, reading, pine. Sensory, embodied."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client notices her own softening: 'I haven't talked about it like that in a long time.'"},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Fear underneath emerges: partner will think she doesn't want them, and she fears it's true. Deeper layer accessed."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Childhood imprint named — mother's label, and the cost of it."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic shift ('loosening in my chest'), reframe ('forty years'), and the breakthrough insight that the trip is precondition for presence, not betrayal."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Breakthrough condition met on all three sub-criteria (refused verdict, located and felt the want, trusted it). Client explicitly names the inherited 'selfish' label from her mother."
}
